text_block_list.name: Sales Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Here's your fifty liters of fresh cream. Thank you
for your patronage!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Thanks! See you again soon! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm free today, so the academy has asked me to
chaperone a few of the students' trip to the
farmer's market.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
This cream will help us make an absolutely buono
cake! ☆

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I see! As a princess, I hope to learn a great
deal today! ♪

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I'll make my prince fall head over heels over head
again with a homemade wedding cake!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
That sounds truly buono! ☆ I'll teach you
everything you need to know!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fifty liters of cream is quite the sight, truth be
told.
choice_data_list: What are you going to do with all of it?
What are you going to do with all of it?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
We're going to use it all to make a ginormous
wedding cake. 'Cause if you're gonna bake, why
not bake big?! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I try to calculate just how big this cake is going
to be...

text_block_list.name: Farmer
text_block_list.text: Heyyy! Watch out!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Huh? That's one of the farmers. What's going on?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: STOMP, STOMP, STOMP!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Aaaah! It's a bull! And it's coming this way!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A bull with bloodshot eyes charges towards us.
There's no time to hesitate. As I desperately try
to get the students out of harm's way...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Oh, my! What a feisty little fella!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Akebono?! Why are you just standing there?!
You'll be sent flying!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I'll be fiiine! Come on, cutie, show me whatcha
got!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Alley-oop!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono grapples the bull straight on, then
lifts its massive body up off the ground!

text_block_list.name: Escaped Bull
text_block_list.text: MOO?! MOOOOO?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
How is she that powerful?! Even the bull's
bamboozled!
choice_data_list: Those moves! Are those from sumo wrestling?!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Buono. ♪ There, there, Mr. Bull. Be a good boy
and calm down now.

text_block_list.name: Escaped Bull
text_block_list.text: Moo...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: She's calming it down with a hug!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Sorry for the wait! ☆ I had to take Mr. Bull back
to his home!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
That was incredible, Akebono! I feel so inspired
right now!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Maybe one day I'll be strong enough to stop an
out-of-control car with my prince inside!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Please! Teach me your ways! Take me on as your
pupil!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Sure, no problem! First, if you want to get bigger,
the hearty hot pot sumo wrestlers eat is probably
the way to go.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
After we're done baking, let's celebrate your
initiation with some hot pot and cake!
choice_data_list: Why not train like a real sumo wrestler?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell them that all that food sounds like too much
for just two people.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you may be right. I have a pretty big
appetite, but Kawakami might struggle with those
portions...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Why don't we invite everyone from our dorm
to eat with us?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Great idea! I'll do whatever I can to help! ♪

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, I can't wait to cook! Let's go buy some
ingredients on our way back home! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I follow after the enthusiastic pair and help them
pick out ingredients.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The following day, everyone in Ritto Dorm is
clutching their stomachs in pain. It's pretty clear
that Hishi Akebono went overboard with her
cooking again.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's going to take more than a single night for
Kawakami Princess to reach bull-hoisting Hishi
Akebono's level.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell her that if she's serious, it'd probably be
better to practice some real sumo wrestler
techniques.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I see... Speaking of which, who taught you your
moves, Akebono?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I've always been a fan of sumo. As a kid, I'd
watch them training on TV, then try to mimic their
moves!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Oh, right! I can teach you some of the easier stuff
right now!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Please do!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, the two of them sumo stomp all the way
back to school...
